spec_match.rationale: The before/after code comparison pairs accurately capture the three major breakage patterns (BroadcastChannel, IndexedDB, relative importScripts) and their solutions.

interactive.rationale: The page is entirely static, consisting of non-interactive code blocks and a summary table, which violates the showcase constraint that concept pages must be interactive.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Consistent with the parent description of a migration code pattern library.

edge_cases.rationale: The broken crumb and see-also links now point to the on-disk '/v150/opaque-origin-for-data-urls/' routes, but the migration cards still need live execution outputs to exercise failure cases directly.

references.rationale: Cites the official ChromeStatus entry link correctly.

design_system.rationale: Layout is nicely presented, utilizing standard table borders and color-mix backgrounds for code highlights.

openQuestions.title: Add live execution trigger buttons to code cards
openQuestions.detail: Convert the static code display cards into an interactive playground. Add a 'Run Live' button to each card that creates the described worker dynamically and captures output or displays the SecurityError / exception logs in a local output console under the card.
